item.title: Emmymade explores surprising fruit flavors
item.description: Emmymade shares a look at fruits with unexpected flavors in this food-focused video.

media:content.media:title: Emmymade explores surprising fruit flavors
media:content.media:description: Emmymade shares a look at fruits with unexpected flavors in this food-focused video.

item.title: Emmymade Recreates Costco-Style Muffins
item.description: Emmymade shares a recipe inspired by the classic Costco muffins, bringing back a familiar favorite in the kitchen.

media:content.media:title: Emmymade Recreates Costco-Style Muffins
media:content.media:description: Emmymade shares a recipe inspired by the classic Costco muffins, bringing back a familiar favorite in the kitchen.
